---
title: "devon_2021-2022_16S_analysis"
author: "Jenifer Spence"
date: '2026-04-17'
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Reading in data and functions
```{r Read in Libraries}
library(tidyverse)      # includes dplyr, tidyr, ggplot2, tibble, readr, purrr, stringr, forcats
library(vegan)          # decostand, vegdist, prcomp, envfit, metaMDS, capscale, ordistep, 
                        # anova.cca, adonis2, clamtest, diversity
library(ggpubr)         # ggarrange
library(magrittr)       # %<>%

#setting a random seed for R's random number generator so that any operations that involve randomness will produce the same results every time the code it run
set.seed(1234)

```

###Specifying aesthetics for ggplot###
```{r Plotting Aesthetics}
###Colour Palettes####
upwelling.cols = c("Upwelling" = "#679bbf",
                   "No upwelling" = "#b6aad3",
                   "Below 50m" = "#2e654f",
                   "Open Water, upper 50m" = "#e0a850")

clam_cols <- c("Upwelling" = "#679bbf", "No upwelling" = "#b6aad3")

bp.cols = c('Cand. Nitrosopumilus' = "#014636",
            'Marine Group II' = "#016c59",
            'Polaribacter' = "#74c476",
            'Sulfitobacter' = "#02818a",
            'Unclass. Flavobacteriaceae' = "#2171b5",
            'NS9 Marine Group' = "#3690c0",
            'Uncult. Nitrincolaceae' = "#67a9cf",
            'Unclass. Rhodobacteraceae'= "#9ecae1",
            'Ulvibacter' = "#807dba",
            'SAR11 (Clade Ia)' = "#9e9ac8",
            'NS11-12 Marine Group' = "#c994c7",
            'Uncult. Flavobacteriaceae' = "#d4b9da",
            'SUP05 Cluster' = "grey60",
            'Formosa' = "rosybrown3",
            'Uncult. Cryomorphaceae' = "rosybrown1",
            'NS5 Marine Group' = "#cb181d",
            'SAR92 Clade' = '#ef3b2c',
            'Unclass. Colwelliaceae' = "#fd8d3c",
            'Rubritaleae' = '#fc9272',
            'Other (<1%)' = "#b8c8d9")

###

###Plot themes####
my_text_theme = function(){
  axis_and_tick_size = 30
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(size = 2, color = "black"))}

my_text_theme_nmds = function(){
  axis_and_tick_size = 30
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_and_tick_size, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "white"),
        panel.border = element_rect(size = 2, color = "black"))}
####

```

###Figure Generation###
```{r PCA}
# Create a PCA (Principal Component Analysis) plot with customization options

# This function performs Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on ecological data, generates a PCA plot, and customizes the plot's appearance and annotations. It allows you to specify various parameters and options for visualizing the PCA results.

# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe 
# col_indices: the column numbers to initially subset from meta_16s before doing anything else. This corresponds to the provided original meta_16s[, c(3, 4, 6, 15, 18:23, 25, 27:30, 39:45)] line.
# rename_map: a named character vector that maps old column names to new ones, e.g. c(Temp = "Temp_C", Depth = "Depth_m"). This replaces the rename() block and makes the renaming explicit and reusable.
# vectors: the names of the numeric environmental variables to include in the PCA and vector fitting (post-renaming).

###PCA Function####
make_16s_pca_plot <- function(meta_16s, col_indices, rename_map, vectors) {
  
  # Select and clean columns
  pca_meta <- meta_16s[, col_indices] %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    filter(if_all(everything(), ~ . != "NA")) %>%
    rename(!!!rename_map)
  
  # Set sample IDs as rownames
  rownames(pca_meta) <- pca_meta$SAMPLE_ID
  
  # Select only numeric variables for PCA
  meta_filt <- pca_meta %>%
    select(all_of(vectors)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.)))) %>%
    na.omit()

  # Perform PCA
  pca_data <- prcomp(meta_filt, scale = TRUE)
  
  # Proportion of variance explained by axes 1 and 2
  sumx <- summary(pca_data)
  prop_explained <- sumx$importance[2, 1:2]
  
  # Build PCA plot data frame and join with full metadata
  pca_plot <- as.data.frame(pca_data$x[, 1:2])
  pca_plot$SAMPLE_ID <- rownames(pca_plot)
  pca_plot <- left_join(pca_plot, meta_16s, by = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  # Add depth bin classification
  pca_plot <- pca_plot %>%
    mutate(depth.bin = case_when(
      Depth_m > 50 ~ "Deep",
      TRUE         ~ "Shallow"))
  
  # Vector fitting using envfit
  meta_filt_plot <- meta_filt[rownames(meta_filt) %in% pca_plot$SAMPLE_ID, ] # use meta_filt directly since it already has the renamed, clean numeric columns
  
  vecs <- envfit(
    pca_plot[, 1:2],
    meta_filt_plot,
    permutations = 999,
    na.rm = TRUE)
  
  vecs_df <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(vecs, display = "vectors"))
  vecs_df <- cbind(vecs_df, Variables = rownames(vecs_df))
  
  # Build plot
  temp_plot <- ggplot(pca_plot) +
    geom_point(data = (pca_plot %>% filter(Year == 2021)),
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = Upwelling.Classification),
               pch = 21, size = 12, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(data = (pca_plot %>% filter(Year == 2022)),
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = Upwelling.Classification),
               pch = 23, size = 12, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = upwelling.cols) +
    geom_segment(data = vecs_df,
                 aes(x = 0, xend = PC1 * 3, y = 0, yend = PC2 * 3),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
                 colour = "grey4") +
    geom_text(data = vecs_df,
              aes(x = PC1 * 3, y = PC2 * 3, label = Variables),
              size = 5) +
    xlab(paste0("PCA1 (", round(prop_explained[1] * 100, 1), "%)")) +
    ylab(paste0("PCA2 (", round(prop_explained[2] * 100, 1), "%)")) +
    # stat_ellipse(data = pca_plot, aes(x=PC1,y=PC2, colour = depth.bin), lwd = 1.5, level=0.95, show.legend = F) + #if you want to place ellipses
    # scale_colour_manual(values = depth.cols) + #ellipses colours
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none") +
    my_text_theme()
  
  return(temp_plot)
}

###

###Calling PCA Function - Example####
rename_map <- c(
  Temp         = "Temp_C",
  Turbidity    = "Turbidity_NTU",
  Stratification = "N2",
  Diss_O2      = "Dis_O2_Conc",
  SiO4         = "SiO4_uM",
  PO4          = "PO4_uM",
  NO2          = "NO2_uM",
  NO3          = "NO3_uM",
  NH3          = "NH3_uM",
  Depth        = "Depth_m"
)

numeric_vectors <- c(
  "Temp", "Turbidity", "Stratification", "Diss_O2",
  "SiO4", "PO4", "NO2", "NO3", "NH3", "Depth"
)

make_16s_pca_plot(
  meta_16s    = meta_16s,
  col_indices = c(3, 4, 6, 15, 18:23, 25, 27:30, 39:45), #or select the columns you want
  rename_map  = rename_map,
  vectors     = numeric_vectors
)
```

```{r NMDS}
# Create an NMDS (Non-metric Multidimensional Scaling) plot with customization options

# This function performs NMDS ordination on ASV abundance data using Bray-Curtis dissimilarity, generates an NMDS plot, and customizes the plot's appearance and annotations. It allows you to specify various parameters for visualizing community composition differences across samples, with points coloured by a metadata variable and 95% confidence ellipses drawn around depth groups.

# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe containing sample metadata and categorical variables
# asv_table: the raw ASV count table to be Hellinger-transformed before ordination, where rows are samples and columns are ASVs 
# drop_cols: column indices to drop from the ASV table before ordination (e.g. non-ASV columns such as sample ID or taxonomy)
# fill_var: the name of the metadata column (as a string) to colour points by, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# fill_cols: a named colour palette (named vector) corresponding to the levels of fill_var
# depth_var: the name of the metadata column (as a string) used to classify samples into depth bins, e.g. "layer.dfg"
# depth_cols: a named colour palette (named vector) for the depth bin ellipses, with names matching "Deep" and "Shallow"

###NMDS Function####
make_16s_nmds_plot <- function(meta_16s, asv_table, drop_cols, fill_var, fill_cols, depth_var, depth_cols) {
  
  # Hellinger transformation of raw ASV table
  asv_table.matrix <- asv_table %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    as.matrix()
  hel_table <- decostand(asv_table.matrix, method = "hellinger")
  
  # Add depth bin classification
  meta_nmds <- meta_16s %>%
    mutate(depth.bin = case_when(
      Depth_m > 50 ~ "Deep",
      TRUE ~ "Shallow"))
  
  # Run NMDS and join with metadata
  nmds_df <- metaNMDS_bray_and_df(hel_table, drop_cols, meta = meta_nmds)
  
  # Ensure Year is character for filtering
  nmds_df$Year <- as.character(nmds_df$Year)
  
  # Fix sample ID labels
  nmds_df$SAMPLE_ID <- fix_labels(nmds_df$SAMPLE_ID, meta_16s, IDt = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  # Build plot
  temp_plot <- ggplot(data = nmds_df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = .data[[fill_var]], label = SAMPLE_ID)) +
    geom_point(data = nmds_df %>% filter(Year == "2021"),
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               pch = 21, size = 12, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = TRUE) +
    geom_point(data = nmds_df %>% filter(Year == "2022"),
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               pch = 23, size = 12, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    # stat_ellipse(data = nmds_df %>% filter(!is.na(depth.bin)),
    #              mapping = aes(x = x, y = y, group = depth.bin, colour = depth.bin),
    #              lwd = 2, level = 0.95, show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE) + #if you want to show ellipses
    # scale_colour_manual(values = depth_cols) + #ellipses colours
    xlab("NMDS1") +
    ylab("NMDS2") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) +
    my_text_theme_nmds()
  
  return(temp_plot)
}

###

###Calling NMDS Function - Example####
make_16s_nmds_plot(
  meta_16s   = meta_16s,
  asv_table  = ASV_table, # raw count table, Hellinger transformation happens inside
  drop_cols  = c(1, 2),
  fill_var   = "Upwelling.Classification",
  fill_cols  = upwelling.cols,
  depth_cols = depth.cols)
###
```

```{r dbRDA}
###RDA Function####

# Create a db-RDA (distance-based Redundancy Analysis) plot with customization options
# This function performs Hellinger transformation on raw ASV data, computes Bray-Curtis dissimilarity, runs a db-RDA (capscale) with stepwise variable selection, and generates a plot of the ordination results with environmental vectors overlaid. 

# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe containing sample metadata and categorical variables
# asv_table: the raw ASV count table to be Hellinger-transformed before ordination
# rename_map: a named character vector mapping old column names to new ones, e.g. c(Temp. = "Temp_C")
# env_vars: character vector of environmental variable names (post-renaming) to include in the RDA
# fill_var: the name of the metadata column (as a string) to colour points by, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# fill_cols: a named colour palette (named vector) corresponding to the levels of fill_var
# label_var: the name of the metadata column (as a string) to use as point labels, e.g. "Sample_Name_Final"
# meta_join_vars: character vector of metadata columns to join onto points for plotting, must include SAMPLE_ID

make_16s_rda_plot <- function(meta_16s, asv_table, rename_map, env_vars, fill_var, fill_cols, label_var, meta_join_vars) {
  
  # Hellinger transformation of raw ASV table
  asv_table.matrix <- asv_table %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    as.matrix()
  hel_table <- decostand(asv_table.matrix, method = "hellinger")
  
  # Clean and prepare metadata
  meta_rda <- meta_16s %>%
    rename(!!!rename_map) %>%
    select(all_of(c("SAMPLE_ID", env_vars))) %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(env_vars), ~ . != "N/A")) %>%  # scope to env_vars only
    na.omit() %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(env_vars), as.numeric))
  
  # Subset and align ASV table to samples in metadata
  hel_df <- hel_table %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% meta_rda$SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  # Compute Bray-Curtis dissimilarity
  dist_rda <- vegdist(hel_df, method = "bray")
  
  # Scale environmental variables
  meta_rda[, env_vars] <- scale(meta_rda[, env_vars], center = TRUE)
  
  # Align metadata to ASV sample order -- join ASV table to ensure same sample set as original code
  meta_rda <- left_join(
    hel_df %>% rownames_to_column(var = "SAMPLE_ID"),
    meta_rda,
    by = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
  select(all_of(c("SAMPLE_ID", env_vars))) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID")

  # Build RDA formula dynamically from env_vars
  rda_formula <- as.formula(paste("dist_rda ~", paste(env_vars, collapse = "+")))

  # Run stepwise db-RDA
  rda_full <- capscale(rda_formula, meta_rda, pstep = 1000, R2scop = TRUE)
  rda_step <- ordistep(rda_full, direction = "both", pstep = 1000, R2scop = TRUE)
  
  # Extract axis variance
  output <- anova.cca(rda_step, by = "axis", step = 1000)
  vec2 <- output$SumOfSqs / sum(output$SumOfSqs) * 100
  
  # Extract points and vectors
  points_df <- as.data.frame(rda_step$CCA$wa[, 1:2])
  points_df$SAMPLE_ID <- rownames(points_df)
  points_df <- left_join(points_df, meta_16s[, meta_join_vars], by = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  vectors_df <- as.data.frame(rda_step$CCA$biplot[, 1:2])
  vectors_df$names <- rownames(vectors_df)
  
  # Build plot
  temp_plot <- ggplot(points_df) +
    geom_point(data = points_df %>% filter(Year == "2021"),
               mapping = aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, fill = .data[[fill_var]]),
               pch = 21, size = 12, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = TRUE) +
    geom_point(data = points_df %>% filter(Year == "2022"),
               mapping = aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, fill = .data[[fill_var]]),
               pch = 23, size = 12, alpha = 0.8, show.legend = TRUE) +
    geom_text(data = points_df,
              aes(x = CAP1, y = CAP2, label = .data[[label_var]]), size = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    geom_segment(data = vectors_df,
                 aes(x = 0, xend = CAP1 / 2, y = 0, yend = CAP2 / 2),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
                 linewidth = 0.75, colour = "black") +
    geom_text(data = vectors_df,
              aes(x = CAP1 / 1.8, y = CAP2 / 1.8, label = names), size = 5) +
    xlab(paste0("RDA1 (", round(vec2[1], digits = 2), "%)")) +
    ylab(paste0("RDA2 (", round(vec2[2], digits = 2), "%)")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    my_text_theme()
  
  return(temp_plot)
}

###Calling the RDA function - Example####
rename_map_rda <- c(
  Temp.          = "Temp_C",
  Sal.           = "Salinity_PSU",
  Turb.          = "Turbidity_NTU",
  Chla           = "ChlA_ug_L",
  Stratification = "N2",
  Diss.O2        = "Dis_O2_Conc",
  SiO4           = "SiO4_uM",
  PO4            = "PO4_uM",
  NO3            = "NO3_uM",
  NH3            = "NH3_uM",
  NO2            = "NO2_uM",
  Density        = "rho"
)

env_vars_rda <- c(
  "Temp.", "Sal.", "Turb.", "Chla", "Stratification",
  "Diss.O2", "PO4", "NO3", "NH3")  # SiO4 excluded due to collinearity with NO3

make_16s_rda_plot(
  meta_16s       = meta_16s_50m,
  asv_table      = ASV_table.50m,
  rename_map     = rename_map_rda,
  env_vars       = env_vars_rda,
  fill_var       = "Upwelling.Classification",
  fill_cols      = upwelling.cols,
  label_var      = "Sample_Name_Final",
  meta_join_vars = c("SAMPLE_ID", "Sample_Name_Final", "Glacier_name", "Year", "Upwelling.Classification"))
###
```

```{r PERMANOVA - geochemical}
###PERMANOVA Function####

# Perform PERMANOVA and pairwise PERMANOVA on physicochemical metadata
# This function calculates Euclidean distances on scaled physicochemical variables, runs a global PERMANOVA and all pairwise comparisons between groups, and returns both the global result and Holm-adjusted pairwise p-values.
# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe
# rename_map: a named character vector mapping old column names to new ones
# env_vars: character vector of environmental variable names (post-renaming) to include
# drop_vars: character vector of numeric columns to drop before distance calculation (e.g. "Depth", "Year")
# group_var: the name of the metadata column (as a string) to use as the grouping variable, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# label_var: the name of the column to use as rownames/sample labels, e.g. "Sample_Name_Final"
# filter_vars: named character vector of columns to pre-filter for "NA" strings, e.g. c("SiO4_uM", "NH3_uM")

make_16s_permanova <- function(meta_16s, rename_map, env_vars, drop_vars, group_var, label_var, filter_vars) {
  
  # Filter rows containing "NA" strings in specified columns
  meta_permanova <- meta_16s
  for (col in filter_vars) {
    meta_permanova <- meta_permanova %>% filter(.data[[col]] != "NA")
  }
  
  # Rename columns
  meta_permanova_all <- meta_permanova %>%
    rename(!!!rename_map)
  
  # Convert env_vars to numeric and set rownames
  meta_nums <- meta_permanova_all %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(env_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = label_var) %>%
    select_if(is.numeric) %>%
    select(-any_of(drop_vars))
  
  # Join group variable back on
  meta_nums <- meta_nums %>%
    mutate(!!label_var := rownames(.)) %>%
    left_join(
      meta_permanova_all %>% select(all_of(c(label_var, group_var))),
      by = label_var
    )
  
  # Set rownames and separate numeric matrix from grouping
  rownames(meta_nums) <- meta_nums[[label_var]]
  meta_nums2 <- meta_nums %>% select(-all_of(c(label_var, group_var)))
  
  # Calculate Euclidean distances on scaled data
  x <- scale(meta_nums2)
  dist_physico <- vegdist(x, method = "euclidean")
  
  # Global PERMANOVA
  adonis_global <- adonis2(
    dist_physico ~ meta_nums[[group_var]],
    permutations = 10000
  )
  cat("Global PERMANOVA result:\n")
  print(adonis_global)
  
  # Pairwise PERMANOVA
  pairwise_p <- numeric()
  layers <- unique(meta_permanova_all[[group_var]])
  layers <- layers[!is.na(layers)]
  layer_pairs <- combn(layers, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  
  for (i in seq_along(layer_pairs)) {
    layer1 <- layer_pairs[[i]][1]
    layer2 <- layer_pairs[[i]][2]
    
    comparison_name <- paste(
      gsub(" ", "_", gsub(",", "", layer1)), "vs",
      gsub(" ", "_", gsub(",", "", layer2))
    )
    
    # Filter to current pair and prepare numeric matrix
    meta_case <- meta_permanova_all %>%
      filter(.data[[group_var]] == layer1 | .data[[group_var]] == layer2) %>%
      mutate(across(all_of(env_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
      column_to_rownames(var = label_var) %>%
      select_if(is.numeric) %>%
      select(-any_of(drop_vars))
    
    dist_case <- vegdist(scale(meta_case), method = "euclidean")
    
    # Extract grouping variable for same samples
    meta_vars_case <- meta_permanova_all %>%
      filter(.data[[group_var]] == layer1 | .data[[group_var]] == layer2) %>%
      column_to_rownames(var = label_var)
    
    adonis_case <- adonis2(
      dist_case ~ meta_vars_case[[group_var]],
      permutations = 10000
    )
    
    pairwise_p[comparison_name] <- adonis_case$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    cat("Comparison:", comparison_name, "- P-value:", adonis_case$`Pr(>F)`[1], "\n")
  }
  
  # Holm-adjusted pairwise p-values
  pairwise_adjusted <- as.data.frame(p.adjust(pairwise_p, method = "holm"))
  
  return(list(
    global   = adonis_global,
    pairwise = pairwise_adjusted
  ))
}

###

###Geochemical PERMANOVA - Example Call####
rename_map_permanova <- c(
  Temp          = "Temp_C",
  Turbidity     = "Turbidity_NTU",
  Stratification = "N2",
  Chla          = "ChlA_ug_L",
  Diss_O2       = "Dis_O2_Conc",
  SiO4          = "SiO4_uM",
  PO4           = "PO4_uM",
  NO2           = "NO2_uM",
  NO3           = "NO3_uM",
  NH3           = "NH3_uM",
  Depth         = "Depth_m"
)

env_vars_permanova <- c(
  "Temp", "Turbidity", "Stratification", "Chla", "Diss_O2",
  "SiO4", "PO4", "NO2", "NO3", "NH3", "Salinity_PSU")

# Full water column
result_all <- make_16s_permanova(
  meta_16s    = meta_16s,
  rename_map  = rename_map_permanova,
  env_vars    = env_vars_permanova,
  drop_vars   = c("Depth", "Year", "Distance_from_glacier"),
  group_var   = "Upwelling.Classification",
  label_var   = "Sample_Name_Final",
  filter_vars = c("SiO4_uM", "NH3_uM", "N2", "NO3_uM")
)

# Upper 50m only
result_50m <- make_16s_permanova(
  meta_16s    = meta_16s_50m,
  rename_map  = rename_map_permanova,
  env_vars    = env_vars_permanova,
  drop_vars   = c("Depth", "Year", "Distance_from_glacier"),
  group_var   = "Upwelling.Classification",
  label_var   = "Sample_Name_Final",
  filter_vars = c("SiO4_uM", "NH3_uM", "N2", "NO3_uM")
)

# Access results
result_all$global
result_all$pairwise
result_50m$pairwise
```

```{r PERMANOVA - Microbial community}
###PERMANOVA - microbial community####

# Perform PERMANOVA and pairwise PERMANOVA on microbial community (ASV) data
# This function prepares ASV and metadata tables, computes Bray-Curtis dissimilarity on the ASV table, runs a global PERMANOVA and all pairwise comparisons between groups, and returns both the global result and Holm-adjusted pairwise p-values.
# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe
# asv_table: the raw ASV count table with a sample ID column
# asv_sample_id: the name of the sample ID column in the ASV table, e.g. "Sample_ID"
# asv_drop_cols: column indices or names to drop from the ASV table after joining metadata (e.g. non-ASV columns)
# rename_map: a named character vector mapping old column names to new ones
# env_vars: character vector of environmental variable names (post-renaming) to include
# drop_vars: character vector of numeric columns to drop before distance calculation
# group_var: the name of the metadata column to use as the grouping variable, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# label_var: the name of the column to use as rownames/sample labels, e.g. "Sample_Name_Final"
# filter_vars: character vector of columns to pre-filter for "NA" strings, e.g. c("SiO4_uM", "NH3_uM")

make_16s_asv_permanova <- function(meta_16s, asv_table, asv_sample_id,
                                   rename_map, env_vars, drop_vars,
                                   group_var, label_var, filter_vars) {
  
  # Filter rows containing "NA" strings in specified columns
  meta_permanova <- meta_16s
  for (col in filter_vars) {
    meta_permanova <- meta_permanova %>% filter(.data[[col]] != "NA")
  }
  
  # Rename columns
  meta_permanova_all <- meta_permanova %>%
    rename(!!!rename_map)
  
  # Convert env_vars to numeric and set rownames
  meta_nums <- meta_permanova_all %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(env_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = label_var) %>%
    select_if(is.numeric) %>%
    select(-any_of(drop_vars))
  
  # Join group variable back on
  meta_nums <- meta_nums %>%
    mutate(!!label_var := rownames(.)) %>%
    left_join(
      meta_permanova_all %>% select(all_of(c(label_var, group_var))),
      by = label_var
    )
  rownames(meta_nums) <- meta_nums[[label_var]]
  
  # Prepare ASV table - join metadata to get label_var as rownames
  asv_prep <- asv_table %>%
    rename(SAMPLE_ID = all_of(asv_sample_id)) %>%
    left_join(meta_16s, by = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    filter(.data[[label_var]] %in% meta_permanova_all[[label_var]]) %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = label_var) %>%
    select(all_of(colnames(asv_table)[colnames(asv_table) != asv_sample_id])) 
  
  # Compute Bray-Curtis dissimilarity on ASV table
  dist_asv <- vegdist(asv_prep, method = "bray")
  
  # Align metadata to ASV table row order
  meta_nums <- meta_nums[match(rownames(asv_prep), rownames(meta_nums)), , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Global PERMANOVA
  adonis_global <- adonis2(
    as.formula(paste("dist_asv ~", group_var)),
    data = meta_nums,
    permutations = 10000
  )
  cat("Global PERMANOVA result:\n")
  print(adonis_global)
  
  # Pairwise PERMANOVA
  pairwise_p <- numeric()
  layers <- unique(meta_permanova_all[[group_var]])
  layers <- layers[!is.na(layers)]
  layer_pairs <- combn(layers, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  
  for (i in seq_along(layer_pairs)) {
    layer1 <- layer_pairs[[i]][1]
    layer2 <- layer_pairs[[i]][2]
    
    comparison_name <- paste(
      gsub(" ", "_", gsub(",", "", layer1)), "vs",
      gsub(" ", "_", gsub(",", "", layer2))
    )
    
    # Filter metadata to current pair
    meta_case <- meta_permanova_all %>%
      filter(.data[[group_var]] == layer1 | .data[[group_var]] == layer2) %>%
      mutate(across(all_of(env_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
      column_to_rownames(var = label_var) %>%
      select_if(is.numeric) %>%
      select(-any_of(drop_vars)) %>%
      mutate(!!label_var := rownames(.)) %>%
      left_join(
        meta_permanova_all %>% select(all_of(c(label_var, group_var))),
        by = label_var
      )
    rownames(meta_case) <- meta_case[[label_var]]
    
    # Prepare ASV table for current pair
    asv_case <- asv_table %>%
      rename(SAMPLE_ID = all_of(asv_sample_id)) %>%
      left_join(meta_16s, by = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
      filter(.data[[label_var]] %in% meta_case[[label_var]]) %>%
      column_to_rownames(var = label_var) %>%
      select(all_of(colnames(asv_table)[colnames(asv_table) != asv_sample_id]))
    
    dist_case <- vegdist(asv_case, method = "bray")
    
    # Align metadata to ASV table row order
    meta_case <- meta_case[match(rownames(asv_case), rownames(meta_case)), , drop = FALSE]
    
    # Run PERMANOVA
    adonis_case <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_case ~", group_var)),
      data = meta_case,
      permutations = 10000
    )
    
    pairwise_p[comparison_name] <- adonis_case$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    cat("Comparison:", comparison_name, "- P-value:", adonis_case$`Pr(>F)`[1], "\n")
  }
  
  # Holm-adjusted pairwise p-values
  pairwise_adjusted <- as.data.frame(p.adjust(pairwise_p, method = "holm"))
  
  return(list(
    global   = adonis_global,
    pairwise = pairwise_adjusted
  ))
}
###

###Calling the ASV PERMANOVA function - Example####
rename_map_permanova <- c(
  Temp          = "Temp_C",
  Turbidity     = "Turbidity_NTU",
  Stratification = "N2",
  Chla          = "ChlA_ug_L",
  Diss_O2       = "Dis_O2_Conc",
  SiO4          = "SiO4_uM",
  PO4           = "PO4_uM",
  NO2           = "NO2_uM",
  NO3           = "NO3_uM",
  NH3           = "NH3_uM",
  Depth         = "Depth_m"
)

env_vars_permanova <- c(
  "Temp", "Turbidity", "Stratification", "Chla", "Diss_O2",
  "SiO4", "PO4", "NO2", "NO3", "NH3", "Salinity_PSU"
)

# Full water column - grouped by upwelling classification
result_asv_all <- make_16s_asv_permanova(
  meta_16s       = meta_16s,
  asv_table      = ASV_table.filt,
  asv_sample_id  = "SAMPLE_ID",
  rename_map     = rename_map_permanova,
  env_vars       = env_vars_permanova,
  drop_vars      = c("Depth", "Year", "Distance_from_glacier"),
  group_var      = "Upwelling.Classification",
  label_var      = "Sample_Name_Final",
  filter_vars    = c("SiO4_uM", "NH3_uM", "NO3_uM", "N2"))

# Upper 50m - grouped by upwelling classification
result_asv_50m <- make_16s_asv_permanova(
  meta_16s       = meta_16s_50m,
  asv_table      = ASV_table.50m,
  asv_sample_id  = "SAMPLE_ID",
  rename_map     = rename_map_permanova,
  env_vars       = env_vars_permanova,
  drop_vars      = c("Depth", "Year", "Distance_from_glacier"),
  group_var      = "Upwelling.Classification",
  label_var      = "Sample_Name_Final",
  filter_vars    = c("SiO4_uM", "NH3_uM", "NO3_uM", "N2"))

# Access results
result_asv_all$global
result_asv_all$pairwise
result_asv_50m$pairwise
###
```

```{r Taxa Barplot}
###Barplot Function####

# Create a stacked bar plot of prokaryotic community composition by taxonomy
# This function prepares ASV and taxonomy data, calculates relative abundances, groups low-abundance taxa below a threshold into "Other", applies custom taxon name shortening, and generates a faceted stacked bar plot grouped by a metadata variable.
# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe
# asv_table: the filtered ASV count table with a SAMPLE_ID column
# taxa_table: the taxonomy table with an ASV_ID column and a Unique.ID column
# sample_order: character vector of Sample_Name_Final values in the desired x-axis order
# taxa_rename: named character vector mapping full Unique.ID strings to short display names
# taxa_levels: character vector defining the factor order of taxa for the legend and fill
# group_var: the name of the metadata column to facet by, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# group_levels: character vector defining the factor order of the grouping variable
# fill_cols: named colour palette corresponding to taxa_levels
# plot_title: string for the legend title, e.g. "16S Prokaryote Taxonomy"
# ra_threshold: numeric, taxa with mean relative abundance below this are grouped as "Other", default 1

make_16s_barplot <- function(meta_16s, asv_table, taxa_table, sample_order,
                             taxa_rename, taxa_levels, group_var, group_levels,
                             fill_cols, plot_title = "16S Prokaryote Taxonomy",
                             ra_threshold = 1) {
  
  # Prepare wide ASV table filtered to samples in metadata
  asv_bp <- asv_table %>%
    filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% meta_16s$SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "ASV_ID")
  
  # Filter taxonomy table to match ASVs
  taxa_bp <- taxa_table %>%
    filter(ASV_ID %in% asv_bp$ASV_ID)
  
  # Convert to long format and calculate relative abundance
  long_asv <- make_long_noRA(asv_bp, taxa_bp)
  long_asv$Sample_Name_Final <- fix_labels(long_asv$Sample_Name_Final, meta_16s, IDt = "SAMPLE_ID")
  long_asv <- long_asv %>%
    group_by(Sample_Name_Final) %>%
    mutate(percent = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Summarise by taxon and sample
  vec <- c("Sample_Name_Final", "Unique.ID")
  bp <- long_asv %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(vec))) %>%
    summarise(summed.percent = sum(percent), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Unique.ID) %>%
    mutate(avg.sum = mean(summed.percent)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Group taxa below threshold into "Other"
  tax <- ifelse(bp$avg.sum < ra_threshold,
                paste0("Other (<", ra_threshold, "%)"),
                as.vector(bp[["Unique.ID"]]))
  bp[["Unique.ID"]] <- tax
  
  # Apply custom taxon name shortening
  for (full_name in names(taxa_rename)) {
    bp$Unique.ID <- ifelse(bp$Unique.ID == full_name, taxa_rename[[full_name]], bp$Unique.ID)
  }
  
  # Set factor levels for taxa and join metadata
  bp$Unique.ID <- factor(bp$Unique.ID, levels = taxa_levels)
  bp <- bp %>%
    left_join(meta_16s, by = "Sample_Name_Final") %>%
    select(all_of(c("Sample_Name_Final", "Unique.ID", "summed.percent", "avg.sum", group_var)))
  
  # Set factor levels for sample order and grouping variable
  bp$Sample_Name_Final <- factor(bp$Sample_Name_Final, levels = sample_order)
  bp[[group_var]] <- factor(bp[[group_var]], levels = group_levels)
  
  # Build plot
  temp_plot <- ggplot(bp, aes(x = Sample_Name_Final, y = summed.percent, fill = Unique.ID)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    facet_grid(as.formula(paste(". ~", group_var)),
               drop = TRUE, scale = "free", space = "free_x") +
    ylab("") +
    xlab("") +
    labs(fill = plot_title) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 10, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 30, colour = "black"),
      legend.position   = "right",
      legend.key.size   = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      legend.text       = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.title      = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.title        = element_blank(),
      strip.text        = element_blank()
    )
  
  return(temp_plot)
}

###

###Calling the barplot function - Example####
# prep the data to see what the top taxa are
asv_bp <- ASV_table.filt %>%
  filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% meta_16s$SAMPLE_ID) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ASV_ID")

taxa_bp <- taxa_table %>% filter(ASV_ID %in% asv_bp$ASV_ID)

long_asv <- make_long_noRA(asv_bp, taxa_bp)
long_asv$Sample_Name_Final <- fix_labels(long_asv$Sample_Name_Final, meta_16s, IDt = "SAMPLE_ID")
long_asv <- long_asv %>%
  group_by(Sample_Name_Final) %>%
  mutate(percent = count / sum(count) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

bp_check <- long_asv %>%
  group_by(Sample_Name_Final, Unique.ID) %>%
  summarise(summed.percent = sum(percent), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Unique.ID) %>%
  mutate(avg.sum = mean(summed.percent)) %>%
  distinct(Unique.ID, avg.sum) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg.sum))

# see all taxa above 1%
bp_check %>% filter(avg.sum >= 1)

#manually rename the taxa for the function
taxa_rename_prok <- c(
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Polaribacter"                        = "Polaribacter",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Sulfitobacter"               = "Sulfitobacter",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_"                                    = "Unclass. Flavobacteriaceae",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_NS9_marine_group_NS9_marine_group"                     = "NS9 Marine Group",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Oceanospirillales_Nitrincolaceae_uncultured"                  = "Uncult. Nitrincolaceae",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_"                            = "Unclass. Rhodobacteraceae",
  "Archaea_Crenarchaeota_Nitrososphaeria_Nitrosopumilales_Nitrosopumilaceae_Candidatus_Nitrosopumilus"       = "Cand. Nitrosopumilus",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Ulvibacter"                          = "Ulvibacter",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Sphingobacteriales_NS11-12_marine_group_NS11-12_marine_group"           = "NS11-12 Marine Group",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_SAR11_clade_Clade_I_Clade_Ia"                                = "SAR11 (Clade Ia)",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_uncultured"                          = "Uncult. Flavobacteriaceae",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Thiomicrospirales_Thioglobaceae_SUP05_cluster"                = "SUP05 Cluster",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Formosa"                             = "Formosa",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Cryomorphaceae_uncultured"                             = "Uncult. Cryomorphaceae",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS5_marine_group"                    = "NS5 Marine Group",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Cellvibrionales_Porticoccaceae_SAR92_clade"                   = "SAR92 Clade",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Colwelliaceae_"                               = "Unclass. Colwelliaceae",
  "Bacteria_Verrucomicrobiota_Verrucomicrobiae_Verrucomicrobiales_Rubritaleaceae_Rubritalea"                 = "Rubritaleae",
  "Archaea_Thermoplasmatota_Thermoplasmata_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II"                  = "Marine Group II"
)

taxa_levels_prok <- c(
  "Cand. Nitrosopumilus", "Marine Group II", "Polaribacter",
  "Sulfitobacter", "Unclass. Flavobacteriaceae", "NS9 Marine Group",
  "Uncult. Nitrincolaceae", "Unclass. Rhodobacteraceae", "Ulvibacter",
  "SAR11 (Clade Ia)", "NS11-12 Marine Group", "Uncult. Flavobacteriaceae",
  "SUP05 Cluster", "Formosa", "Uncult. Cryomorphaceae",
  "NS5 Marine Group", "SAR92 Clade", "Unclass. Colwelliaceae",
  "Rubritaleae", "Other (<1%)"
)

sample_order_prok <- c("Jones_Sound_OG_5_2022", "Jones_Sound_OG_27_2022",
                       "Jones_Sound_OG_100_2022", "Jones_Sound_2_5_2021",
                       "Jones_Sound_2_100_2021", "Jones_Sound_SSW_5_2021", 
                       "Jones_Sound_DSW_350_2021", "Jones_Sound_OG_400_2022", 
                       "Jones_Sound_OG_450_2022", "Jones_Sound_OG_50_2022",  
                       "Jones_Sound_14_28_2021", "Jones_Sound_Deep_15_2022", 
                       "Jones_Sound_Deep_40_2022", "South_Cape_Fiord_34_5_2021", 
                       "South_Cape_Fiord_10B_5_2022", "South_Cape_Fiord_10B_45_2022",
                       "South_Cape_Fiord_10B_80_2022", "Jones_Sound_14_300_2021",
                       "Jones_Sound_Deep_500_2022", "Grise_Fiord_27_5_2021", "Grise_Fiord_27_20_2021",
                       "Grise_Fiord_28_5_2021", "Grise_Fiord_S12_25_2022", "Grise_Fiord_S12_50_2022",
                       "Grise_Fiord_S13_5_2022", "Grise_Fiord_S13_30_2022", "Grise_Fiord_S13_55_2022",
                       "Grise_Fiord_S13_90_2022", "Grise_Fiord_S1_60_2022", "Grise_Fiord_S1_90_2022",
                       "Grise_Fiord_S1_380_2022", "Harbour_39_5_2021", "Harbour_40_5_2021",
                       "Harbour_40_20_2021", "Jakeman_3_5_2021", "Jakeman_3_20_2021",
                       "Jakeman_3_100_2021", "Jakeman_50_5_2021", "Jakeman_5_20_2021",
                       "Jakeman_40b_5_2021", "Jakeman_40b_20_2021", "Jakeman_41b_5_2021", 
                       "Jakeman_41b_20_2021", "Jakeman_42b_5_2021",
                       "Jakeman_44b_5_2021", "Jakeman_44b_20_2021", "Jakeman_46b_5_2021",
                       "Jakeman_46b_20_2021", "Jakeman_50_20_2021", "Starnes_1_6_5_2021", 
                       "Starnes_1_6_20_2021", "Starnes_1_7_5_2021", "Starnes_1_7_25_2021",
                       "Starnes_2_10_5_2021", "Starnes_2_11_5_2021", 
                       "Belcher_1_5_2021", "Belcher_1_30_2021", "Belcher_1_250_2021", 
                       "Belcher_3_5_2021", "Belcher_3_45_2021", "Belcher_3_225_2021",  
                       "Belcher_5_5_2021", "Belcher_5_20_2021", "Belcher_5_250_2021", 
                       "Belcher_9_5_2021", "Belcher_9_30_2021", "Belcher_9_300_2021",
                       "Belcher_11_5_2021", "Belcher_11_30_2021", "Belcher_11_300_2021",
                       "Belcher_13_5_2021", "Belcher_13_35_2021", "Belcher_13_250_2021", 
                       "Belcher_14_5_2021", "Belcher_14_30_2021", "Belcher_14_325_2021", 
                       "Belcher_1_40_2022", "Belcher_1_65_2022", "Belcher_1_105_2022", 
                       "Belcher_1_240_2022", "Belcher_6_45_2022", "Belcher_6_70_2022",      
                       "Sverdrup_1_5_2021", "Sverdrup_1_25_2021", "Sverdrup_1_120_2021",   
                       "Sverdrup_2_5_2021", "Sverdrup_2_18_2021", "Sverdrup_2_125_2021",
                       "Sverdrup_20_5_2021", "Sverdrup_3_5_2021", "Sverdrup_3_20_2021",
                       "Sverdrup_3_125_2021", "Sverdrup_5_5_2021", "Sverdrup_5_8_2021", 
                       "Sverdrup_5_50_2021", "Sverdrup_7_5_2021", "Sverdrup_7_15_2021",
                       "Sverdrup_11_5_2021", "Sverdrup_11_8_2021", "Sverdrup_11_45_2021", 
                       "Sverdrup_14_5_2021", "Sverdrup_14_18_2021", "Sverdrup_14_50_2021", 
                       "Sverdrup_15_5_2021", "Sverdrup_15_28_2021", "Sverdrup_15_200_2021",
                       "Sverdrup_1_5_2022", "Sverdrup_1_15_2022", "Sverdrup_1_40_2022",
                       "Sverdrup_4_5_2022", "Sverdrup_4_100_2022", "Sydkap_12_20_2021",
                       "Sydkap_12_5_2021", "Sydkap_13_5_2021", "Sydkap_13_20_2021", "Sydkap_14_5_2021",
                       "Sydkap_14_20_2021", "Sydkap_18_5_2021", "Sydkap_18_20_2021", "Sydkap_7_5_2022",
                       "Sydkap_7_30_2022", "Sydkap_7_50_2022", "Sydkap_7_80_2022", "Sydkap_1_5_2022",
                       "Sydkap_1_20_2022", "Sydkap_1_45_2022", "Sydkap_1_80_2022",
                       "Sydkap_SDB1_5_2022", "Sydkap_SDB1_15a_2022", "Sydkap_SDB1_15b_2022",
                       "Sydkap_SDB1_45_2022",
                       "Talbot_Inlet_1_5_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_1_20_2021",
                       "Talbot_Inlet_1_500_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_7_5_2021",
                       "Talbot_Inlet_7_15_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_7_350_2021",
                       "Talbot_Inlet_8_5_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_8_20_2021",
                       "Talbot_Inlet_8_180_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_5_5_2021",
                       "Talbot_Inlet_5_25_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_5_340_2021",        
                       "Talbot_Inlet_6_5_2021", "Talbot_Inlet_6_400_2021")

group_levels_prok <- c("No upwelling", "Upwelling", "Open Water, upper 50m", "Below 50m")

make_16s_barplot(
  meta_16s     = meta_16s,
  asv_table    = ASV_table.filt,
  taxa_table   = taxa_table,
  sample_order = sample_order_prok,  # the full sample order vector
  taxa_rename  = taxa_rename_prok,
  taxa_levels  = taxa_levels_prok,
  group_var    = "Upwelling.Classification",
  group_levels = group_levels_prok,
  fill_cols    = bp.cols,
  plot_title   = "16S Prokaryote Taxonomy",
  ra_threshold = 1
)

```

```{r Shannon Diversity Boxplot}
# Create a Shannon diversity boxplot grouped by a metadata variable

# This function calculates Shannon diversity from a Hellinger-transformed ASV table, joins metadata, and generates a boxplot of diversity grouped by a specified variable.
# asv_table: the raw ASV count table to be Hellinger-transformed before ordination, where rows are samples and columns are ASVs 
# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe
# meta_vars: character vector of metadata columns to join, must include SAMPLE_ID and group_var
# group_var: the name of the metadata column to group by on the x-axis, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# group_levels: character vector defining the factor order of the grouping variable
# group_labels: character vector of display labels corresponding to group_levels
# fill_cols: named colour palette corresponding to group_levels
# y_limits: numeric vector of length 2 for y-axis limits, e.g. c(3, 7)

###Shannon Diversity Boxplot Function####
make_shannon_boxplot <- function(asv_table, meta_16s, meta_vars, group_var,
                                 group_levels, group_labels, fill_cols, y_limits) {
  
  # Hellinger transformation of raw ASV table
  asv_table.matrix <- asv_table %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "Sample_ID") %>%
    as.matrix()
  hel_table <- decostand(asv_table.matrix, method = "hellinger")
  
  # Calculate Shannon diversity
  shannon <- diversity(hel_table, index = "shannon") %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rename(Shannon.Diversity = ".") %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  # Join metadata
  shannon_meta <- left_join(shannon, meta_16s[, meta_vars], by = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  # Set factor levels and labels for grouping variable
  shannon_meta[[group_var]] <- factor(shannon_meta[[group_var]],
                                      levels = group_levels,
                                      labels = group_labels)
  
  # Build plot
  temp_plot <- ggplot(data = shannon_meta, aes(x = .data[[group_var]],
                                               y = Shannon.Diversity,
                                               fill = .data[[group_var]])) +
    geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_cols) +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("Shannon Diversity") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 30, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 30, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x  = element_blank(),
      panel.border  = element_rect(size = 2, color = "black")
    )
  
  return(temp_plot)
}

###

###Calling the Shannon Diversity Function - Example####
make_shannon_boxplot(
  asv_table    = ASV_table,
  meta_16s     = meta_16s,
  meta_vars    = c("SAMPLE_ID", "Depth_m", "Glacier_name", "Upwelling.Classification"),
  group_var    = "Upwelling.Classification",
  group_levels = c("No upwelling", "Upwelling", "Open Water, upper 50m", "Below 50m"),
  group_labels = c("No upwelling", "Upwelling", "Open Water, upper 50m", "Below 50m"), #if you want to relabel anything
  fill_cols    = upwelling.cols,
  y_limits     = c(3, 7)) #change depending on output for values

###
```

```{r CLAM Analysis}
###Dataframe prep + CLAM Analysis Function ####
# Run CLAM specialization analysis on ASV data comparing between sites in the upper 50 m of the water colymn with Upwelling vs. No Upwelling, within 5 km of glacier face or shoreline
# This function filters samples, runs clamtest to identify specialist ASVs, prepares upper 50m and deep dataframes with relative abundances, applies taxon renaming, and aligns factor ordering between the two depth layers.
# meta_16s: the main input metadata dataframe
# meta_16s_50m: metadata filtered to upper 50m samples
# asv_table: the raw ASV count table with a Sample_ID column
# taxa_table: the taxonomy table with ASV_ID and Unique.ID columns
# asv_sample_id: the name of the sample ID column in the ASV table, e.g. "Sample_ID"
# group_var: metadata column to group by in clamtest, e.g. "Upwelling.Classification"
# filter_groups: character vector of group_var levels to EXCLUDE, e.g. c("Open Water, upper 50m", "Below 50m")
# dist_threshold: maximum distance from glacier to include, e.g. 5 km
# rename_lookup: named character vector mapping full Unique.ID strings to short display names
# coverage_limit: clamtest coverage.limit argument, default 25
# alpha: clamtest alpha argument, default 0.01
# specialization: clamtest specialization argument, default 0.75
# ra_threshold: minimum average relative abundance to include in upper 50m plot, default 0.5
# deep_depth: minimum depth in metres to define "deep" samples, default 50

make_clam_data <- function(meta_16s, meta_16s_50m, asv_table, taxa_table,
                           asv_sample_id = "Sample_ID", group_var,
                           filter_groups, dist_threshold,
                           rename_lookup, coverage_limit = 25,
                           alpha = 0.01, specialization = 0.75,
                           ra_threshold = 0.5, deep_depth = 50) {
  
  # Filter metadata to upwelling/no upwelling samples within distance threshold
  meta_clam <- meta_16s_50m %>%
    filter(!.data[[group_var]] %in% filter_groups) %>%
    filter(Distance_from_glacier <= dist_threshold)
  
  # Prepare ASV table - filter to relevant samples and remove zero-count ASVs
  asv_clam <- asv_table %>%
    rename(SAMPLE_ID = all_of(asv_sample_id)) %>%
    filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% meta_clam$SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    pivot_longer(-SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    group_by(name) %>%
    mutate(total = sum(value)) %>%
    filter(total != 0) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(-total) %>%
    pivot_wider(id_cols = SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  # Align metadata and ASV table rownames
  meta_clam <- meta_clam %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    select(all_of(group_var))
  
  asv_clam <- asv_clam %>%
    filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% rownames(meta_clam)) %>%
    column_to_rownames(var = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  # Remove zero-sum columns and align shared samples
  asv_clam <- asv_clam[, colSums(asv_clam) > 0]
  shared_ids <- intersect(rownames(asv_clam), rownames(meta_clam))
  asv_clam <- asv_clam[shared_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_clam <- meta_clam[shared_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Run CLAM test
  clam_result <- with(meta_clam,
    clamtest(asv_clam, meta_clam[[group_var]],
             coverage.limit = coverage_limit,
             alpha = alpha,
             specialization = specialization))
  
  clam_result <- clam_result %>%
    rename(ASV_ID = Species) %>%
    left_join(taxa_table, by = "ASV_ID")
  
  # Subset to specialists only and calculate relative abundances
  group_cols <- paste0("Total_", unique(meta_clam[[group_var]]))
  
  clam_subset <- clam_result %>%
    filter(Classes != "Too_rare" & Classes != "Generalist") %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(group_cols),
                 names_to = "Grouping",
                 values_to = "Value") %>%
    group_by(Grouping, Unique.ID) %>%
    mutate(summed.counts = sum(Value)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(Grouping = gsub("Total_", "", Grouping))
  
  clam_bp_df <- clam_subset %>%
    mutate(Value.bp = ifelse(grepl(filter_groups[2], Grouping), -Value, Value)) %>%
    mutate(Specialist = ifelse(grepl(filter_groups[2], Classes), "NoUp", "Up")) %>%
    mutate(Specialist.Unique.ID = paste0(Unique.ID, "_", Specialist)) %>%
    mutate(Specialist.numeric = ifelse(grepl(filter_groups[2], Classes), 2, 1))
  
  # Prepare upper 50m long ASV table
  taxa_clam <- taxa_table %>% filter(ASV_ID %in% clam_bp_df$ASV_ID)
  
  asv_long <- asv_clam %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "ASV_ID") %>%
    filter(ASV_ID %in% taxa_clam$ASV_ID)
  
  long_asv <- make_long_noRA(asv_long, taxa_clam) %>%
    rename(SAMPLE_ID = Sample_Name_Final) %>%
    left_join(meta_clam %>% rownames_to_column("SAMPLE_ID"), by = "SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    rename(Grouping = all_of(group_var))
  
  # Calculate per-sample then per-group relative abundance for upper 50m
  plot_df <- long_asv %>%
    group_by(SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    mutate(sample_total = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
           percent = ifelse(sample_total > 0, 100 * count / sample_total, NA_real_)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(Grouping, Unique.ID) %>%
    summarise(grouping.percent = mean(percent, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Unique.ID) %>%
    filter(any(grouping.percent > ra_threshold)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(Value.bp = ifelse(Grouping == unique(meta_clam[[group_var]])[1],
                             -grouping.percent, grouping.percent)) %>%
    mutate(Classes = clam_bp_df$Classes[match(Unique.ID, clam_bp_df$Unique.ID)]) %>%
    mutate(ASV_ID = clam_bp_df$ASV_ID[match(Unique.ID, clam_bp_df$Unique.ID)]) %>%
    mutate(Unique.ID = recode(Unique.ID, !!!rename_lookup, .default = Unique.ID))
  
  # Prepare deep samples
  meta_deep <- meta_16s %>% filter(Depth_m > deep_depth)
  taxa_deep <- taxa_clam %>% filter(ASV_ID %in% plot_df$ASV_ID)
  
  asv_deep <- asv_table %>%
    rename(SAMPLE_ID = all_of(asv_sample_id)) %>%
    filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% meta_deep$SAMPLE_ID) %>%
    column_to_rownames("SAMPLE_ID") %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column("ASV_ID") %>%
    filter(ASV_ID %in% taxa_deep$ASV_ID)
  
  long_deep <- make_long_noRA(asv_deep, taxa_deep)
  
  clam_bp_deep <- long_deep %>%
    group_by(Unique.ID) %>%
    summarise(count = sum(count), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(percent = 100 * count / sum(count)) %>%
    left_join(clam_bp_df %>% select(Unique.ID, Classes) %>% distinct(),
              by = "Unique.ID") %>%
    mutate(Unique.ID = recode(Unique.ID, !!!rename_lookup, .default = Unique.ID))
  
  # Align factor ordering between upper 50m and deep
  upper_order <- plot_df %>%
    group_by(Classes, Unique.ID) %>%
    summarise(percent_upper = mean(grouping.percent), .groups = "drop")
  
  deep_order <- clam_bp_deep %>%
    group_by(Classes, Unique.ID) %>%
    summarise(percent_deep = mean(percent), .groups = "drop")
  
  order_df <- full_join(upper_order, deep_order, by = c("Classes", "Unique.ID")) %>%
    mutate(across(starts_with("percent"), ~ replace_na(., 0)))
  
  order_up <- order_df %>%
    filter(Classes == "Specialist_Upwelling") %>%
    arrange(desc(percent_upper)) %>%
    pull(Unique.ID)
  
  order_no_up <- order_df %>%
    filter(Classes == "Specialist_No upwelling") %>%
    arrange(desc(percent_upper)) %>%
    pull(Unique.ID)
  
  levels_vec <- c(order_up, order_no_up)
  
  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    mutate(Classes = factor(Classes, levels = c("Specialist_Upwelling", "Specialist_No upwelling")),
           Unique.ID = factor(Unique.ID, levels = rev(unique(levels_vec))))
  
  clam_bp_deep <- clam_bp_deep %>%
    mutate(Classes = factor(Classes, levels = c("Specialist_Upwelling", "Specialist_No upwelling")),
           Unique.ID = factor(Unique.ID, levels = rev(unique(levels_vec)))) %>%
    distinct(Unique.ID, Classes, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  return(list(
    clam_result  = clam_result,
    plot_df      = plot_df,
    clam_bp_deep = clam_bp_deep,
    clam_bp_df   = clam_bp_df
  ))
}

###

###Plotting CLAM results Function####
# Generate CLAM specialist barplots for upper 50m and deep samples
# clam_data: the list output from make_clam_data()
# clam_cols: named colour vector for the two upwelling groups, e.g. c("Upwelling" = "#679bbf", "No upwelling" = "#b6aad3")
# deep_col: colour for the deep barplot, e.g. "#2e654f"
# show_labels: logical, whether to show y-axis taxon labels, default FALSE

make_clam_plots <- function(clam_data, clam_cols, deep_col = "#2e654f", show_labels = FALSE) {
  
  plot_df      <- clam_data$plot_df
  clam_bp_deep <- clam_data$clam_bp_deep
  
  # Symmetric x-axis limits for upper 50m plot
  L <- ceiling(max(abs(plot_df$Value.bp), na.rm = TRUE))
  
  y_axis_theme <- if (show_labels) {
    element_text(size = 25, colour = "black")
  } else {
    element_blank()
  }
  
  # Upper 50m plot
  upper_plot <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Value.bp, y = Unique.ID, fill = Grouping)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = clam_cols) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-L, L), labels = abs) +
    labs(x = "", y = "") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 20, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y  = y_axis_theme,
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Deep plot
  deep_plot <- ggplot(clam_bp_deep, aes(x = percent, y = Unique.ID)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.8, fill = deep_col, show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(x = "", y = "") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 20, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y  = y_axis_theme,
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Combined arrangement
  combined <- ggarrange(upper_plot, deep_plot, nrow = 1, widths = c(3, 1))
  
  return(list(
    upper   = upper_plot,
    deep    = deep_plot,
    combined = combined
  ))
}

###

###Calling the CLAM functions - Example####
###Based on the taxa identified for specialization cutoff and relative abundance cutoff, I created a rename_lookup vector to map the full Unique.ID strings to shorter display names for the plots. You can modify this as needed based on your specific ASVs and taxonomy.
rename_lookup <- c(
   "Archaea_Crenarchaeota_Nitrososphaeria_Nitrosopumilales_Nitrosopumilaceae_Candidatus_Nitrosopumilus__06bd5bec1ccb5b0893f27b3024f49a7e" =
     "Cand. Nitrosopumilus_ASV1",
  "Archaea_Crenarchaeota_Nitrososphaeria_Nitrosopumilales_Nitrosopumilaceae_Candidatus_Nitrosopumilus__25829522245ab7ca1722239106b9d1d2" =
    "Cand. Nitrosopumilus_ASV2",
  "Archaea_Crenarchaeota_Nitrososphaeria_Nitrosopumilales_Nitrosopumilaceae_Candidatus_Nitrosopumilus__648c236167b6a86f2104a069efe7cd67" =
    "Cand. Nitrosopumilus_ASV3",
  "Archaea_Thermoplasmatota_Thermoplasmata_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II__8eab3fcf96ffbbdc0005e704531193ad" = "Marine Group II_ASV1",
    "Archaea_Thermoplasmatota_Thermoplasmata_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II_hydrothermal_vent_12c9862eba95cb0d82bd929cbacd368b" = "Marine Group II_ASV2",
  "Archaea_Thermoplasmatota_Thermoplasmata_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II_Marine_Group_II_hydrothermal_vent_4bc018571f0cb7a7982beaa73835ab67" = "Marine Group II_ASV3",
  "Bacteria_______256dd73fcec6ac88047d4defa9ae29c9" = "Unclass. Bacteria_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_______7b3d3afe275a5bcbd1c72dbf495bbbba" = "Unclass. Bacteria_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Armatimonadota_Chthonomonadetes_Chthonomonadales_Chthonomonadaceae_Chthonomonas__f1512b8121f949b20f8d56a229e0f1c0" = "Chthonomonas",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Chitinophagales_Chitinophagaceae_Flavitalea__0c9f51a5167be639a432908f79d84f77"
  = "Flavitalea",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Cytophagales_Cyclobacteriaceae_Marinoscillum_uncultured_Cytophagia_501f82da8df593c8388c6812940b78a6" = "Marinoscillum",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Crocinitomicaceae_Fluviicola_uncultured_Bacteroidetes/Chlorobi_7e4c7dad6d238f760f964d46c391f620" = "Fluviicola",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Cryomorphaceae_NS10_marine_group_uncultured_Bacteroidetes/Chlorobi_a3cb7ab8a88b86bf619ab9205345a05b" = "NS10 Marine Group_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Cryomorphaceae_NS10_marine_group_uncultured_Flavobacteriia_baaf5e96931ad7df7e362941f0f1d151" = "NS10 Marine Group_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Cryomorphaceae_uncultured__b9716ebfe0f241a3807198020b4f4d89" =
    "Uncult. Cryomorphaceae_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Cryomorphaceae_uncultured_uncultured_bacterium_37ecd8cff3ff8e812ebea4cfe248c0a0" = "Uncult. Cryomorphaceae_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Flavobacterium__28b8633fc41227d70e2338fa450ed8c2" = "Flavobacterium_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Flavobacterium__a4f5f592dd40c58409af4e2dee989552" = "Flavobacterium_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Flavobacterium__fa00ad5f021b300b5e43c40339a24905" = "Flavobacterium_ASV3",
    "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Flavobacterium__c7de82d60809c2abae1ff7c61adedfec" = "Flavobacterium_ASV4",
    "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Flavicella_uncultured_bacterium_cf3c4a886e2523c8f99cf849c31a72bc" = "Flavicella",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS3a_marine_group__3c324de4c9faed35d9c62c6cc7ddb4c8" = "NS3a Marine Group_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS3a_marine_group__612c02ab136cabfe7c040904767b05fd" = "NS3a Marine Group_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS4_marine_group__377053d207159c7a1bb36cce4003cbc5" = "NS4 Marine Group_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS4_marine_group__c73d25b585d3a5ea3afff84b305dd2a2" = "NS4 Marine Group_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS5_marine_group__ec3d3bc4588ff0378e46faf1ab8a1b70" = "N5 Marine Group_ASV1",
    "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS5_marine_group__b8851764647d20a259e09a64d81d3af9" = "NS5 Marine Group_ASV2",
    "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_NS7_marine_group_NS7_marine_group_uncultured_bacterium_db3277b9479ec27d9c838dbaf7264288" = "NS7 Marine Group",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Polaribacter__7422207dab73e24fab9ef0a117fb3005" = "Polaribacter_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Polaribacter__f2d506047edef4a3c9a38ebfd09ac7bf" = "Polaribacter_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_uncultured__474923d60b0c86eae0e6cbe2b008d007" = "Uncult. Flavobacteriaceae_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Cyanobacteria_Cyanobacteriia_Cyanobacteriales_Phormidiaceae_Tychonema_CCAP_1459-11B__6c6acd2f3e85861a938ce9c0a6004a4e" ="Tychonema_CCAP_1459-11B",
  "Bacteria_Planctomycetota_Planctomycetes_Pirellulales_Pirellulaceae_Rubripirellula_uncultured_bacterium_cf5128c045f1d7d55abad3921a3cbe35" = "Rubripirellula",
    "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Roseobacter_clade_NAC11-7_lineage_uncultured_Rhodobacteraceae_c1c58eb8887ff15ecc9f51c94d232fdf" = "NAC11-7 Lineag",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae___422411f208abe54db66be4982d9bfba5" 
  = "Unclass. Rhodobacteraceae",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Octadecabacter_uncultured_marine_7e024437ab55fdcba9c49acbcf5e44c3" = "Octadecabacter",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Planktomarina__273888f165f2eec8d5d95b5569dc27a4" = "Planktomarina",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Sulfitobacter__c9ffc377460d90d5535fac565986b7ce" = "Sulfitobacter_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Sulfitobacter__cfd5ec16f32d35ab5893ead7c5269fe3" = "Sulfitobacter_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Sulfitobacter__eb3e05be63545334c3685a21b974a1a4" = "Sulfitobacter_ASV3",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_uncultured_alpha_proteobacterium_4f76d47d230b80c4a3cd16777226253f" = "Uncult. Rhodobacteraceae",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_Yoonia-Loktanella_Loktanella_salsilacus_c377f15948a7ed999ae5ebedd235290b" = "Yoonia-Loktanella",
    "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodobacterales_Rhodobacteraceae_uncultured_Loktanella_sp._578c4b171595f929fbb4fcc9ab17ef9d" = "Uncult. Loktanella",
   "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_Rhodospirillales_Magnetospiraceae_Magnetospira_uncultured_marine_9f5dbd3f42f69a7d7eaf62177ae0e6f2" = "Magnetospira",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_SAR11_clade____9fcbe67addcf2d54c55b3429f998d73b" 
  = "Unclass. SAR11 Clade",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Alphaproteobacteria_SAR11_clade_Clade_I_Clade_Ia__4a824a4d888c44358ed8e70d497462c1" 
  = "SAR11 Clade Ia",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Alteromonadaceae_Paraglaciecola__cb49ad5af7849a66d1f67399060d70b5" = "Paraglaciecola",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Colwelliaceae___0f0247af7783a695bec7648931a6108e" 
  = "Unclass. Colwelliaceae",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Colwelliaceae_Colwellia__78e56294c430d0c826f9f2896066ad77" = "Colwellia",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Pseudoalteromonadaceae_Pseudoalteromonas__edcb9755963978d6db33397e7d1c964d" 
  = "Pseudoalteromonas_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Psychromonadaceae_Psychromonas__977e4d064d04c5560ad2a6983f212871" = "Unclass. Psychromonas_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Psychromonadaceae_Psychromonas__e5df6ce36c66fe4b8a16035341c1eeb2" = "Unclass. Psychromonas_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Burkholderiales_Comamonadaceae___02523daf5356885c7d28e05d5910acb3" 
  = "Unclass. Comamonadaceae",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Oceanospirillales_Nitrincolaceae_uncultured__51ca15b1d127be3879d0370ca5198eb6" = "Uncult. Nitrincolaceae_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Oceanospirillales_Nitrincolaceae_uncultured__cab212252d9e37afb36e2e0ebf212854" = "Uncult. Nitrincolaceae_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Oceanospirillales_Pseudohongiellaceae_Pseudohongiella__d1e180be3599fa01ad97157aea33a61e" = "Pseudohongiella",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_OM182_clade_OM182_clade_OM182_clade_marine_gamma_b572fb01e0b54a8c6666ca997fa34eff" = "OM182 Clade",
    "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_SAR86_clade_SAR86_clade_SAR86_clade__8fd1cbe0890b89c069502b66cbbf0547" = "SAR86 Clade",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Thiomicrospirales_Thioglobaceae_SUP05_cluster__473d4bcfc4263c681e2781b7d3811f8b" = "SUP05 Cluster_ASV1",
    "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Thiomicrospirales_Thioglobaceae_SUP05_cluster__e1903c4ac05bde8ecf14a089432923fd" = "SUP05 Cluster_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Thiotrichales_Thiotrichaceae_uncultured_uncultured_marine_26033d65078c88ae7d2a3d36369f2480" = "Uncult. Thiotrichaceae_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Thiotrichales_Thiotrichaceae_uncultured_uncultured_marine_77a6972068e7e7e8d5376c8571ebba3a" = "Uncult. Thiotrichaceae_ASV2",
    "Bacteria_SAR324_clade(Marine_group_B)_SAR324_clade(Marine_group_B)_SAR324_clade(Marine_group_B)_SAR324_clade(Marine_group_B)_SAR324_clade(Marine_group_B)__eb75eb12e76aee17e9e0e98af59e1674" = "SAR324 clade (Marine Group B)",
  "Bacteria_Verrucomicrobiota_Verrucomicrobiae_Verrucomicrobiales_Rubritaleaceae_Roseibacillus_seawater_metagenome_e76e19b0942921f35ddbc56322b762a5" = "Roseibacillus_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Verrucomicrobiota_Verrucomicrobiae_Verrucomicrobiales_Rubritaleaceae_Roseibacillus__488249b757b3c8b6fff9e9d25b16fb95" = "Roseibacillus_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Verrucomicrobiota_Verrucomicrobiae_Verrucomicrobiales_Rubritaleaceae_Rubritalea__29ae0dbc6f0e79d6cc1da456e704bc6e" = "Rubritalea_ASV1",
  "Bacteria_Verrucomicrobiota_Verrucomicrobiae_Verrucomicrobiales_Rubritaleaceae_Rubritalea_uncultured_bacterium_bc5d7ba02e1c288b7c02fd5dd2c9c1a3" = "Rubritalea_ASV2",
  "Archaea_Nanoarchaeota_Nanoarchaeia_Woesearchaeales_GW2011_GWC1_47_15_GW2011_GWC1_47_15_uncultured_archaeon_52dad663301d451f2942b9ff02e20944" =
    "GW2011_GWC1_47_15",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_NS3a_marine_group__5698326776d7189a37bfc616f2b47135" = "NS3a Marine Group_ASV3",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_Polaribacter__f0af1fdda947c94e9b77cb6fdca6b830" = "Polaribacter_ASV3",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_Flavobacteriaceae_uncultured__8df40942ce7d33030b9807614df3e50f" = "Uncult. Flavobacteriaceae_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Bacteroidota_Bacteroidia_Flavobacteriales_NS9_marine_group_NS9_marine_group_uncultured_Bacteroidetes_aec9fb01b5fdb32596c975ca9984d322" = 
    "NS9 Marine Group",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria______afa14a9e472000cea557aa92b4da226b" = "Unclass. Bacteria_ASV3",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Alteromonadales_Pseudoalteromonadaceae_Pseudoalteromonas__6ead949833a94af307af35163c44bbc6" =
    "Pseudoalteromonas_ASV2",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Burkholderiales_Burkholderiaceae_Burkholderia-Caballeronia-Paraburkholderia__5cae451902ed5bf92eb73d82426c3f16"
  = "Burkholderia-Caballeronia-Paraburkholderia",
  "Bacteria_Proteobacteria_Gammaproteobacteria_Nitrosococcales_Methylophagaceae_uncultured__82af70e200c351c30281eeb4615be3d7" = "Uncult. Methylophagaceae")

clam_data <- make_clam_data(
  meta_16s       = meta_16s,
  meta_16s_50m   = meta_16s_50m,
  asv_table      = ASV_table,
  taxa_table     = taxa_table_ASV,
  asv_sample_id  = "Sample_ID",
  group_var      = "Upwelling.Classification",
  filter_groups  = c("Open Water, upper 50m", "Below 50m"),
  dist_threshold = 5,
  rename_lookup  = rename_lookup,
  coverage_limit = 25,
  alpha          = 0.01,
  specialization = 0.75,
  ra_threshold   = 0.5,
  deep_depth     = 50
)

clam_cols <- c("Upwelling" = "#679bbf", "No upwelling" = "#b6aad3")

# Without taxon labels
plots <- make_clam_plots(clam_data, clam_cols, deep_col = "#2e654f", show_labels = FALSE)
plots$combined

# With taxon labels for post-processing and to confirm taxa are in same order
plots_labelled <- make_clam_plots(clam_data, clam_cols, deep_col = "#2e654f", show_labels = TRUE)
plots_labelled$combined

###

```
